_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: These mice were viable and fertile, lived a normal lifespan, and did not form neurofibromas or MPNSTs. No peripheral nerve defects were noted on gross or pathologic examination.
details: Mice were viable and fertile, lived a normal lifespan, and did not form neurofibromas or MPNSTs. No peripheral nerve defects were noted on gross or pathologic examination.
